description_long: This is a modern, straight-edged chair with a rectangular backrest and seat, both upholstered in a light beige or cream-colored material. The frame, legs, and outer border of the backrest are constructed from a dark, likely wooden or metal material, providing a sharp contrast to the soft upholstery. The chair features four sturdy, square legs and a high, flat backrest for support. There are no armrests, giving it a minimalist and versatile appearance suitable for dining or meeting spaces. The seat and backrest appear cushioned, offering comfort for extended sitting. Its clean lines and neutral color palette make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors such as cafes, offices, or waiting areas.
description: A modern chair with a light cushioned seat and backrest framed by a dark, sturdy structure, featuring four square legs and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full rectangular backrest and seat, highlighting the contrast between the light upholstery and dark frame.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the cushioned seat and backrest, as well as the straight, supportive back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, dark frame outlining the backrest and the alignment of the rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the flat seat and backrest profile.
